mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.ticket_id, c.author_id, u.display_name AS author_name, u.username AS author_username, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM dts_comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.author_id WHERE c.ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.ticket_id, c.author_id, u.display_name AS author_name, u.username AS author_username, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM dts_comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.author_id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dts_comments (ticket_id, author_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{authorId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dts_comments WHERE id = #{id} AND author_id = #{authorId}
